svg.text: Banks spend weeks reviewing loan applications manually.
IntelliCredit reads financial documents, researches the company online,
scores credit risk with AI, and writes the full appraisal report — in minutes.
FastAPI · Ollama · Gemini · XGBoost · SHAP · pdfplumber · ReportLab · Python 3.10
• Risk Score 0–100 • Rating: AAA to D
① pdfplumber / OCR → raw text chunks
Fallback logic: local → cloud if offline
• Top 5 risk drivers shown to analyst
